title: Run Phase 1 AWGN simulations: Fig 1 and Fig 3 product codes vs 5G NR LDPC
description:
Run the headline AWGN simulations from the paper (Figures 1 and 3) and validate results against reference data.

## Figure 1: (1024, 441) product code vs 5G NR LDPC

- Component: dRM(32,21) — `[(32,21)² dRM]` product code
- Decoder: turbo-SOGRAND (I_max=20, alpha=0.5, L≤4)
- LDPC: 5G NR with BP and normalized min-sum (I_max=50)
- Metric: BLER, Eb/N0 range 0–2.5 dB

## Figure 3: (256, 121) product code vs 5G NR LDPC + CA-Polar

- Component: eBCH(16,11) — `[(16,11)² eBCH]` product code
- Metrics: BLER, BER, queries/bit, iterations, Eb/N0 range 0–4 dB
- Note: CA-Polar is reference only, not our target to implement

## Validation

- Reference data from pgfplots `.tex` files in `~/Projects/so-grand/img_PY/`
- LDPC BP baseline must match paper's LDPC curves within ~0.1 dB
- Product code turbo-SOGRAND curves should match paper's product code curves
- Document any discrepancies with analysis

## Acceptance Criteria

- Both simulations run to completion with sufficient statistics (≥100 frame errors per SNR point).
- LDPC baseline matches paper within ~0.1 dB.
- Product code results are qualitatively consistent with paper (product code outperforms LDPC at target BLERs).
- Results saved in CSV/JSON format with all metrics.
- Comparison plots or data tables are produced.

## Location

Example or binary in `crates/gf2-coding/examples/` or a dedicated simulation runner.
